final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [flomsoner]
SELECT objid, gjentaksintervall, omrade
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 1
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, kommunenummer, matrikkelnummertekst, lagretberegnetareal, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301' AND lagretberegnetareal > 5000;

1.description: get Drammen municipality row and geometry

2.description: get parcels in Drammen with area > 5000 m2

4.description: find parcels that intersect the 200-year flood zones

5.description: deduplicate parcels (one row per teig) and keep area

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, objid, kommunenummer, matrikkelnummertekst, lagretberegnetareal, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301' AND lagretberegnetareal > 5000;

1.description: resolve kommunenummer and get municipality geometry for Drammen

2.description: select parcels in Drammen with area > 5000 m2 (no geometry heavy operations)

4.description: reduce 200-year flomareal to the Drammen municipality extent (intersects kommuner.omrade)

5.description: find parcels that intersect the reduced 200-year flomareal (parcel.omrade intersects flomareal.omrade)

6.description: one row per parcel: group by teigid and keep parcel area as metric for sorting

iterations.ai_content: {"query_mode":"multi_db","planned_steps":[{"step":1,"action":"query","database":"kommuner","purpose":"resolve kommunenummer and get municipality geometry for Drammen"},{"step":2,"action":"query","database":"matrikkeleneiendomskartteig","purpose":"select parcels in Drammen with area > 5000 m2 (no geometry heavy operations) "},{"step":3,"action":"query","database":"flomsoner","purpose":"select flomareal polygons for gjentaksintervall = 200 (200-year) "},{"step":4,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"reduce 200-year flomareal to the Drammen municipality extent (intersects kommuner.omrade)"},{"step":5,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"find parcels that intersect the reduced 200-year flomareal (parcel.omrade intersects flomareal.omrade)"},{"step":6,"action":"aggregate","database":null,"purpose":"one row per parcel: group by teigid and keep parcel area as metric for sorting"},{"step":7,"action":"sort","database":null,"purpose":"sort parcels by area descending"},{"step":8,"action":"limit","database":null,"purpose":"return top 10 parcels"}]}

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, objid, kommunenummer, matrikkelnummertekst, lagretberegnetareal, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301' AND lagretberegnetareal > 5000;
